cart.title: Karo
cart.allUpToDate: U sebetsa ka mokhoa o nepahetseng!
cart.noUnpaidInvoices: Ha ho liinvoisi tse sa lefoang tse fumanehileng.
cart.addBillingAddressPrompt: Kenyelletsa aterese ea tefiso ho tsoela pele le ho reka ha hao.
cart.selectPayPalType: Khetha Mofuta oa Tefo ea PayPal
cart.zeroCreditCards: Ha o na likhathate tsa kiriti
cart.addCardPrompt: Ho kenyelletsa khathe ea kiriti, tobetsa konopo ea Kenyelletsa Khathe e Ncha.
cart.autoChargeCc: Lefa Khathe ea Kiriti Ka Bo-eona
cart.paymentActivationPrompt: Kopa u lefe ho qalisa tshebeletso. Ha tefiso e amohuoa, tshebeletso ea hao e tla qala ka ho potlaka.
cart.manualBankPayment: Khetho ea Tefo ea Banka ka Letsoho:
cart.bankPaymentNote: Kamora ho lefa, bula tikete ea tsheheletso ka ID ea transaction, letsatsi, le pallelo e lefilweng. Re tla kenya tefo ka letsoho.

creditCard.deleteConfirm: Na u tiisetsa hore u batla ho tlosa karete ea hau ea mokitlane {card}?
creditCard.name: Lebitso
creditCard.verifyIntroStep1: Netefatso e hlokeha pele khathe ea kiriti e sebedisoa. InterServer e tla lefa lipalopalo tse peli tse ka tlase ho $1.00 sekhahla ho khathe ea hao.
creditCard.verifyBillingStatement: Litefiso tsena li tla bonahala lenaneong la hao la tefiso mo e ka bang metsotso e meng, hangata tlasa litransaction tse teng. Ha o sa bone litefiso tsena, ikopanye le kompani ea hao ea kiriti.
creditCard.verifyVoidNotice: Litefiso tsena tsa tumello ke bakeng sa netefatso feela mme li tla hlakoloa matsatsing a 3-5, ho latela banka ea hao.
creditCard.securityCode: Khoutu ea Tsêpo ea Khathe (CVV / CSV)
creditCard.acceptTempCharges: Ke amohela litefiso tse peli tsa nakoana tse ka tlase ho $1.00 sekhahla.
creditCard.verifyBankLogin: Kena banking ea inthanete ea khathe ea hao ea kiriti kapa bitsa banka ea hao ho netefatsa lipalopalo tse peli tse lefuoeng. Litefiso tsena tsa tumello li tla nyamela ka morê matsatsi a 3-5.
creditCard.enterAmountsPrompt: Kopa u kenye lipalopalo tse peli tse lefuoeng ho khathe ea hao ea kiriti. Litheko li tlameha ho ba ka USD.
creditCard.currencyNote: Hlokomela hore litefiso lenaneong la hao la kiriti li ka ba ka mochini o mong ho feta o hlokahalang. Haeba lenane la hao la kiriti ha le bontse lipalopalo tsa mokeli ka mochini o hlokahalang, o tlamehile ho ikopanye le kompani ea hao ea kiriti.
creditCard.verifiedTooltip: Khathe ena e netefaditsoeng mme e lumelletsoe ho sebelisoa tsamaisong ea rona.
creditCard.enableCardTooltip: Tobetsa mona ho lumella khathe ena ea kiriti.

paymentSuccess.title: Tefo e Atlehile
paymentSuccess.thankYou: Re leboha tefo ea hau. Ts'ebelisano ea hau e phethiloe ka katleho.

prepays.title: Matlole a Pre-Paid
prepays.noPrepaidFunds: Ha ho matlole a pre-paid a fumanehang
prepays.showingPage: Ho bontsâ leqephe {page} la {totalPages} le lirekote {records} ho tsoa {totalRecords}
prepays.autoUseNewInvoices: Sebelisa ka bo-eona ho liinvoise tse ncha
prepays.deletePrepayConfirm: Na u u-bua nnete ha u batla ho hlakola tefo ea hao ea pele #{id} le nalane ea eona?

pay.title: Lefa Liinvoise
pay.creatingPaymentRequest: E ntse e theha Kopo ea Tefo...

paymentTypes.title: Mefuta ea Tefo
paymentTypes.ccNote: Likhathate tsohle tsa kiriti li tlameha ho netefatsoa pele li sebelisoa. Ho li netefatsa, tobetsa konopo ea "Netefatsa".
paymentTypes.selectPreferredMethod: Khetha Mokhoa o Ratang oa Tefo
paymentTypes.deleteInvoiceConfirm: Na u u-bua nnete ha u batla ho hlakola invoise ea hao {id}?
